mechanism_narrative: A low unemployment rate, while generally positive, can signal a tight labor market where further improvements are difficult, and any upward movement from this low base would indicate economic weakening, leading to negative S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or the Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A significant increase in the federal funds rate over a short period signals an aggressive monetary tightening stance by the Federal Reserve, which increases borrowing costs and dampens economic activity, leading to negative S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises by more than 0.5pp in 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS at 2.56% (t-1mo) suggests room for tightening
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or the Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous decline in retail sales and an increase in the unemployment rate indicates a significant weakening of consumer demand and labor market health, signaling a broad economic downturn that negatively impacts corporate revenues and S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS declines month-over-month AND UNRATE rises by > 0.2pp month-over-month
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS at 683974.0 (t-1mo) and UNRATE at 3.5% (t-1mo) are high/low, making declines/rises from these levels significant
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or the Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: In an environment of industrial expansion, a sustained increase in industrial production reflects robust manufacturing and overall economic activity, leading to immediate positive sentiment and higher S&P 500 returns.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO at 104.5464 (t-2mo) is at a healthy level
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite positive signal, or the Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A consistently high level of housing starts indicates strong underlying demand for housing and future construction activity, which generally supports broader economic growth and corporate earnings, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over a longer horizon.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite positive signal, or the Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A significant month-over-month increase in non-farm payrolls signals a strengthening labor market, which boosts consumer spending capacity and corporate profitability, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS at 153018.0 (t-1mo) is a high base
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite positive signal, or the Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When inflation (proxied by CPIAUCSL) is accelerating and the Federal Reserve is actively raising interest rates, the combined effect of higher borrowing costs and reduced real purchasing power creates a challenging environment for corporate profits, leading to negative S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL increases by > 0.5% month-over-month AND FEDFUNDS rises > 0.25pp in 1 month
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or the Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: During an economic expansion, positive growth in real GDP signals improving economic fundamentals and corporate earnings potential, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns as business confidence remains high.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 growth rate (QoQ annualized) is positive
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 at 19895.271 (t-6mo) is a high level
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite positive signal, or the Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.
